fields.label: Developer token
fields.help: Sign in to your Google Ads manager account, open https://ads.google.com/aw/apicenter, apply for API access if needed, then copy the developer token shown in API Center.

fields.label: OAuth client ID
fields.help: In Google Cloud Console, configure the OAuth consent screen with the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/adwords scope, then go to APIs & Services > Credentials, create an OAuth client ID (Desktop app is recommended for single-user access), and copy its client ID.

fields.label: OAuth client secret
fields.help: Copy the client_secret paired with the OAuth client ID from Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials, or from that client's downloaded credentials JSON file.

fields.label: OAuth refresh token
fields.help: Follow https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/oauth/single-user-authentication using the OAuth client's downloaded JSON file. After gcloud application-default login completes with the adwords scope, copy refresh_token from the generated application_default_credentials.json file.

fields.label: Manager customer ID
fields.help: Optional. In Google Ads, select the manager account used to access client accounts and copy its 10-digit customer ID from the account selector or page header. Remove hyphens before entering it; for example, enter 1234567890 instead of 123-456-7890.
